steps.prompt:
Read the transcript or source at {source}. Extract all factual claims, predictions, and investment-relevant assertions. Write structured output to .claude/plans/{pipeline}-claims.md with: claim text, source, confidence, falsifiability.

End with ## Handoff: numbered claim list, open questions.

Read .claude/plans/{pipeline}-claims.md (## Handoff). For each claim, search for confirming AND disconfirming evidence using Exa, Brave, and S2. Write verification table to .claude/plans/{pipeline}-verified.md: | Claim | Evidence For | Evidence Against | Verdict | Sources |

End with ## Handoff: verified claims, refuted claims, uncertain claims.

Read .claude/plans/{pipeline}-verified.md (## Handoff). For each verified claim that implies causation, apply causal discipline: draw the DAG, identify confounders, check for bad controls. Flag claims that assume correlation=causation. Write to .claude/plans/{pipeline}-causal.md.

End with ## Handoff: causally sound claims, flagged claims, DAG sketches.

Read .claude/plans/{pipeline}-causal.md (## Handoff). Based on verified, causally sound claims, propose paper trades. For each: ticker, direction, thesis (1-2 sentences), key risk, time horizon, confidence. Write to .claude/plans/{pipeline}-trades.md.

End with ## Handoff: trade proposals ranked by confidence × edge.

Read .claude/plans/{pipeline}-trades.md (## Handoff). Record approved trades to the paper trading ledger. Each entry: date, ticker, direction, entry price (current), thesis, confidence, time horizon. Commit with [intel] prefix.
